slashblade.slash_art.annihilationblade.s: Anchors on the crosshair target or aimed point, tears open a rift of all things, then scans a wide field and executes hostile targets under terminus judgement. Range, target cap, scan step, and visual scale are configurable.
annihilationblade.slash_arts.spatial_fra: Anchors on the crosshair target or aimed point, tears open a rift of all things, then scans a wide field and executes hostile targets under terminus judgement. Range, target cap, scan step, and visual scale are configurable.
annihilationblade.slash_art.spatial_frac: Anchors on the crosshair target or aimed point, tears open a rift of all things, then scans a wide field and executes hostile targets under terminus judgement. Range, target cap, scan step, and visual scale are configurable.
slash_art.annihilationblade.spatial_frac: Anchors on the crosshair target or aimed point, tears open a rift of all things, then scans a wide field and executes hostile targets under terminus judgement. Range, target cap, scan step, and visual scale are configurable.
slashblade.slash_art.annihilationblade.i: Channels Demonic Blade: Blood Prison into an infernal domain. Slashes inside the domain blink through hostile targets while the client receives the blood overlay and pressure-heavy particle show. Duration, radius, particle interval, and visual scale are configurable.
annihilationblade.slash_art.infernal_sla: Channels Demonic Blade: Blood Prison into an infernal domain. Slashes inside the domain blink through hostile targets while the client receives the blood overlay and pressure-heavy particle show. Duration, radius, particle interval, and visual scale are configurable.
se.annihilationblade.dankong.desc: Locks hostile targets in range, blinks through them in sequence, leaves terminus cuts behind, then returns to the origin. Hold Shift to interrupt; Left Ctrl toggles blink mode while holding Annihilation Blade.
se.annihilationblade.world_rift.desc: Tears a rift wound into the struck target, drags nearby hostile targets into the rupture, and executes them. Pull radius, target cap, and visual scale are configurable.
se.annihilationblade.terminus_echo.desc: Sends layered terminus echoes forward, forming repeated horizontal cuts that sweep through enemies like a fading refrain. Range, width, wave count, interval, cooldown, and target cap are configurable.
se.annihilationblade.void_dominion.desc: Unfolds a void dominion in front of the player, marks hostile targets inside the area, and erases them one by one. Domain range, target cap, cooldown, and visual scale are configurable.
Collapses causality from the first struck target, searches the nearest hostile targets, then creates anchors and slash bridges before chain execution. Chain radius, chain cap, cooldown, and visual scale are configurable.
Projects a wide starless judgement wave forward, checks targets along its projected path, and delivers the heaven-cleaving verdict. Range, width, target cap, cooldown, and visual scale are configurable.
se.annihilationblade.phantom_judgement.d: Summons orbiting phantom blades to lock scattered targets, then calls down dense sword rain for focused judgement. Search duration, orbiting sword count, falling sword count, lingering time, target cap, and visual scale are configurable.
se.annihilationblade.abyssal_decree.desc: Builds an abyssal star crown above the player, prioritizes hostile targets, and drops decree strikes from above one by one. Search range, target cap, strike interval, cooldown, and visual scale are configurable.
se.annihilationblade.blood_leech.desc: A core Blood Prison passive. Hostile hits turn the wielder's health into both risk and leverage, trading high-pressure melee for lifesteal sustain. Lifesteal and damage logic are fixed.
se.annihilationblade.spirit_shield.desc: Blood Prison's emergency safeguard. When health falls too low, it unfolds a spirit shield and short buffs to stabilize the wielder. Shield safety logic is fixed.
se.annihilationblade.phantom_mark.desc: Blood Prison's hunting mark. Repeated hits stack phantom marks; when they burst, phantom blades tear into the target. Burst sword count, delay, visual radius, and visual scale are configurable.
slash_art.annihilationblade.infernal_sla: Channels Demonic Blade: Blood Prison into an infernal domain. Slashes inside the domain blink through hostile targets while the client receives the blood overlay and pressure-heavy particle show. Duration, radius, particle interval, and visual scale are configurable.
item.annihilationblade.desc.line1: §8"§dWhen the stars fall silent, this blade still hums in the void.§8"
item.annihilationblade.desc.line2: §8"§5It does not cut flesh; it erases existence's permission to remain.§8"
item.annihilationblade.desc.line3: §8"§dSevered space, wounded worlds, and the last refrain of the end.§8"
item.annihilationblade.desc.line4: §8"§6The wielder needs no victory; the conclusion kneels first.§8"
item.annihilationblade.annihilation_core: §dRight-click to awaken the blade of terminus
item.annihilationblade.annihilation_frag: §7Nine starfall remnants converge into the §5Annihilation Core
jei.annihilationblade.blade_desc.annihil: Annihilation Blade is a named blade built around terminus execution, rift chaining, and large-scale visual impact. Spatial Fracture opens the battlefield, while Severed Space, World Rift, Terminus Echo, Void Dominion, Causality Collapse, Starless Judgement, Phantom Judgement, and Abyssal Decree pull enemy groups layer by layer into the end. It favors area suppression, chained clearing, and strong combat feedback.
jei.annihilationblade.blade_desc.blood_p: Demonic Blade: Blood Prison is a named blade built around health risk, a blood-red domain, and phantom pursuit. Infernal Slaughter opens the domain and blinks through targets, Blood Leech sustains the wielder, Spirit Shield protects the danger window, and Phantom Mark converts repeated hits into burst damage. Compared with Annihilation Blade, it leans harder into close-range pressure.
